summary: Retested the HIGH priority fix for sendPaymentLink in Bookings.jsx. The function is now defined (lines 135-148) and works end-to-end: clicking ₹ button posts to /api/payments/create-link/{id} (200), shows 'Payment link created' toast, and opens a new tab to a wa.me URL containing the Razorpay rzp.io short URL. No runtime errors, no console errors.

New tab opens to https://api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=<mobile>&text=... containing rzp.io/rzp/... payment link
